channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Barely: House GOP passes government funding bill without help from Democrats
item.description: House Republicans this week passed a government funding bill 217-213 without assistance from Democrats, losing only one vote from Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: California bill that would make it illegal to defend yourself pulled
item.description: Assembly Bill 1333, which would have changed what qualifies as self-defense and eliminated circumstances such as defending your home or property, has been pulled due to public pressure and criticism from District Attorneys.
item.dc:creator: Dom McAndrew, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to where we stand with a potential government shutdown
item.description: Democrats are torn on how to vote for Trump's budget bill amid a looming government shutdown if an agreement is not made.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blue state's LGBT 'conversion therapy' ban violates Constitution, 'very easy case' for SCOTUS, says expert
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to take up a case challenging a Colorado law's ban on so-called "conversion therapy" for minors after it declined to hear a similar case last year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Social Security says it will no longer accept bank changes over the phone
item.description: Those who need to change their direct deposit information with Social Security will have to do it online or in-person.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Federal judge rules Trump must reinstate many fired federal employees
item.description: A federal judge ruled Thursday that the Trump administration must reinstate probationary government employees fired unlawfully at several agencies, lambasting the Justice Department at a hearing for a “sham” gambit that enabled a key official to avoid testifying in the case. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minnesota House bill to encourage sharing of immigration data with ICE introduced
item.description: The bill aims to prevent state and local governments from limiting their employees’ ability to share immigration data, including the legal status of immigrants, with federal authorities.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Thamer, MPR News

item.title: In Rochester, a new program helps students’ families avoid eviction
item.description: In many cases, the cycle of homelessness can start with an eviction. Kids with unstable housing struggle to learn in school. So a new program in Rochester is preventing evictions from ever happening to kids and their families.
item.dc:creator: Catharine Richert, MPR News

item.title: The U.S. agency that monitors weather will cut another 1,000 jobs, AP sources say
item.description: Multiple sources tell The Associated Press that the Trump Administration is starting another round of job cuts — this one more than 1,000 — at the nation’s weather, ocean and fisheries agency.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: The European Union retaliates after the U.S. metals tariffs take hold
item.description: The European Union on Wednesday announced retaliatory trade action with a series of duties on U.S. products, responding to the Trump administration rise in tariffs on all steel and aluminum imports.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: House GOP passes spending bill, sending plan to avert government shutdown to Senate
item.description: The bill puts significant pressure on Democrats in the Senate, whose votes will be needed in order to avoid a shutdown. The federal government runs out of money at the end of the day on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Deirdre Walsh and Claudia Grisales, MPR News

item.title: Meteorologist-turned-lawmaker advocates for life-saving supplemental weather radar
item.description: DFL state Sen. Robert Kupec, who represents the region including Moorhead and Detroit Lakes, joined Cathy Wurzer on Tuesday’s Morning Edition to explain why he thinks the state should invest more than $3 million over the next two fiscal years in the project.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: What to know about Mark Carney, elected next Canadian prime minister
item.description: Mark Carney, a former central banker, won his Liberal Party's election in a landslide on Sunday to replace Justin Trudeau as prime minister of Canada. He will be sworn into office in the coming days.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: President Trump's tariffs raise concerns of economic recession
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – President Donald Trump’s tariffs on products from Canada and Mexico have some Americans worried that they will lead the economy into a recession.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11
